mapper.select: select (select count(member_no) from MEMBER) m_cnt, (select count(member_no) from GOODS_QNA) g_cnt, (select count(member_no) from QNA) q_cnt, (select count(member_no) from AS_LIST) as_cnt, (select count(order_state) from ORDER_LIST where order_state = 0) o_cnt_a, (select count(order_state) from ORDER_LIST where order_state = 1) o_cnt_b, (select count(order_state) from ORDER_LIST where order_state = 2) o_cnt_c, (select count(order_state) from ORDER_LIST where order_state = 3) o_cnt_d, (select count(order_state) from ORDER_LIST where order_state = 4) o_cnt_e, (select count(order_state) from ORDER_LIST where order_state = 5) o_cnt_f

select l.order_date, d.order_no, m.member_no, m.member_id, m.member_name, g.goods_name, l.order_total_order_price, l.order_total_pay_price, DATE_FORMAT(l.order_date, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') order_date, l.order_pay_bank, l.order_express, l.order_state,
(select count(sd.order_no) from ORDER_DETAIL sd where sd.order_no = l.order_no ) as hap_cnt
from MEMBER m, ORDER_LIST l, ORDER_DETAIL d, GOODS g
where m.member_no = l.member_no and l.order_no = d.order_no and d.goods_no = g.goods_no
and l.order_state = #{order_state}
and d.ORDER_DETAIL_NO in (select min(ORDER_DETAIL_NO) as Dno from ORDER_DETAIL group by order_no)

select l.as_no, l.as_gubun, l.member_no, l.as_title, l.as_content, l.order_no, l.order_detail_no, l.as_state, l.order_state, DATE_FORMAT(l.as_sdate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as_sdate, DATE_FORMAT(l.as_edate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as_edate, m.member_id, m.member_name, m.member_phone, m.member_email, m.member_grade
from AS_LIST l, MEMBER m
where l.member_no = m.member_no and l.as_state = #{as_state}
order by l.as_no asc
mapper.update: UPDATE AS_LIST SET as_state = 3, as_title = ' ---- 요청내용 확인중 취소처리---- ', as_edate = NOW() WHERE as_no = #{as_no}
mapper.insert: insert into ORDER_DETAIL ( order_no, goods_no, goods_att_no, order_detail_price, order_detail_color, order_detail_size, order_detail_amount, coupon_no, coupon_discount, order_discount_apply, order_detail_save_point, order_detail_state ) VALUES ( #{order_no}, #{goods_no}, #{new_goods_att_no}, #{order_detail_price}, #{order_detail_color}, #{order_detail_size}, #{order_detail_amount}, 0, 0, #{order_discount_apply}, #{order_detail_save_point}, '10')
mapper.update: UPDATE AS_LIST SET as_state = '3', as_edate = NOW() WHERE as_no = #{as_no}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO POINT (MEMBER_NO, POINT_VAL, POINT_USE_DATE, POINT_TOTAL) VALUES ( #{member_no}, #{order_detail_save_point}, NOW(), #{total})
mapper.select: select p.point_total from ORDER_LIST l, POINT p where l.member_no = p.member_no and l.order_no = #{order_no} order by p.point_no desc limit 1

SELECT AAA.* FROM ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY MEMBER_NO) RNUM, COUNT(*) OVER() AS TOTAL_COUNT, MEMBER_NO, MEMBER_ID, MEMBER_NAME, DATE_FORMAT(MEMBER_BIRTH, '%Y/%m/%d') MEMBER_BIRTH, MEMBER_EMAIL, MEMBER_PHONE, MEMBER_ZIPCODE, MEMBER_ADDR1, MEMBER_ADDR2, DATE_FORMAT(MEMBER_DATE, '%Y/%m/%d') MEMBER_DATE, MEMBER_GRADE, MEMBER_TOTAL, DATE_FORMAT(MEMBER_LOG, '%Y/%m/%d') MEMBER_LOG, CASE WHEN MEMBER_DELETE = '0' THEN '가입' ELSE '탈퇴' END MEMBER_DELETE, EMAIL_AGREE, SMS_AGREE FROM MEMBER
WHERE MEMBER_ID LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR MEMBER_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR MEMBER_GRADE LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
WHERE MEMBER_ID LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
WHERE MEMBER_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
WHERE MEMBER_GRADE LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
) AAA WHERE AAA.RNUM BETWEEN #{START} AND #{END} ORDER BY AAA.RNUM
